name: Ford red-team operator context
description: Non-secret local operating knowledge for Ford red-team assessments. This file may be committed because it contains no credentials, tokens, customer data, or engagement evidence.

organization.name: Ford Motor Company
notes: Treat Ford-owned domain indicators as background ownership knowledge, not automatic active-assessment approval.
Per-engagement scope still controls what GLaDOS and subagents may actively test.

auth_flows.name: Ford ADFS / Active Directory
auth_flows.allowed_use: Authentication/runtime dependency only unless the operator explicitly expands active testing scope.

auth_flows.name: Dradis and DradisTab
auth_flows.allowed_use: Prior-report lookup and report workflow only. Never push findings without operator approval.

scope_policy.dependency_host_handling: Hosts discovered through redirects, JavaScript config, OIDC metadata, or app bootstrapping are auth/runtime dependency candidates. They may be used for login/rendering if approved by the operator context and engagement ROE, but they are not fuzzing/exploitation targets until explicitly added to the plan.
scope_policy.osint_priority: OSINT supports planning after direct app behavior and prior local reports. Do not let OSINT override observed app behavior.
